text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Branch Predictor + Frontend ~15%

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:11.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ← 分支预测器: 猜测下一步执行哪条指令

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Rename/Allocate/ROB ~20%

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:11.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ← 乱序执行引擎: 让指令不按顺序执行以加速

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Scheduler + Execution Units ~10%

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:11.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ← 实际的计算单元 (ALU: 做加减乘除)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: L1 Data Cache (48KB) ~10%

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:11.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ← 一级缓存: 最靠近计算单元的高速存储

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: L1 Instr Cache (32KB) ~5%

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:11.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ← 指令缓存: 存放即将执行的指令

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: L2 Cache (1.25MB) ~35%

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:11.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ← 二级缓存: 面积最大的单元!

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Other (TLB, Bus Interface) ~5%

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 4× Warp Scheduler + Dispatch ~5%

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:11.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ← Warp 调度器: 选择哪组线程执行 (极简)

svg.text: Register File (256KB) ~30%

svg.text: ← 寄存器文件: 每个线程的专属极快存储

svg.text: 4× Tensor Core ~10%

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:11.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ← 矩阵乘法专用加速器 (后续第6章详解)

svg.text: L1/Shared Memory (192KB) ~25%

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:11.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ← 一级缓存 + 可编程共享存储 (共享同一块硬件)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Other (I-Cache, Tex, etc.) ~5%

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 下面是一个 CPU 核心和 GPU SM 的芯片面积分配对比。

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 不需要记住每个细节，重点是看两者的"面积分配比例"有多么不同:

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Intel P-Core (~4mm², 约 10 亿晶体管):

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6e3a1;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: → 计算单元只占 10%, 其余全是缓存和控制逻辑

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: NVIDIA Ampere SM (~5mm², 约 5 亿晶体管):

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: (SM = Streaming Multiprocessor, GPU 的基本计算单元, 类似 CPU 的一个"核心")

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6e3a1;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: → 计算单元+寄存器占 60%! 缓存只占 25%, 控制逻辑只有 5%

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 关键差异:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - CPU 用 55% 面积做缓存+控制 → 让单线程极快

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - GPU 用 60% 面积做寄存器+计算 → 让大量线程同时跑
